message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 80
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ParticipantFontSize 22
  ParticipantFontStyle plain
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageFontSize 22
  DividerBorderThickness 3
  DividerBorderColor #000000
  DividerFontSize 28
  DividerFontStyle bold
}

participant Client as C
participant Server as S

== "Authentication" ==
C -> S : 1  REQUEST  (AuthenticationRequest)
S --> C : 2.1  ACCEPT-REQUEST  (AuthenticationResponse)
S --> C : 2.2  REJECT-REQUEST  (AuthenticationResponse)

== "Request Delete a file" ==
C -> S : 3  REQUEST  (DeleteFolderRequest)
S --> C : 4.1  ACCEPT-REQUEST  (DeleteFolderResponse)
S --> C : 4.2  REJECT-REQUEST  (DeleteFolderResponse)

@enduml
